microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end customer relationships** for enterprise biopharma-scale partners (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), standardizing a proactive account cadence across 45+ annual resilience drills to drive **$14M+ in business impact**.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and translating partner feedback into a **self-service scheduling system** that reduced operational toil by 30% across all accounts.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a replicable validation model.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as primary stakeholder lead for a **sovereign-cloud isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract and managing all escalation paths.

Built an internal **AI-powered planning agent** and restructured reporting workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39%, increase drill capacity by 21%, and reduce manual reporting effort across the customer portfolio.

Served as the internal voice of the customer, maintaining a consolidated backlog of partner requests across accounts and translating recurring feedback patterns into **prioritized roadmap feature requests** with engineering.

Prepared and delivered polished, data-driven insight packages for senior stakeholders by turning raw operational data into **clear executive narratives**—decks, dashboards, and risk summaries surfacing issues before escalation.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code generation workflows by conducting customer-facing demos and training sessions, achieving utilization across 14 key teams and saving **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Conducted 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, translating customer feedback into **actionable product requirements** that shaped the intent-based YAML generation roadmap.

Improved data integrity and customer-facing retrieval by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and reducing manual reporting effort.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by aligning 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework, translating cross-functional feedback into a clear, executive-ready product roadmap.

Ran discovery sessions with 20+ service teams to identify 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then built a **data-driven roadmap** to automate critical paths — directly informing product strategy and backlog prioritization.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to surface operational toil patterns across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact improvements, and make roadmap decisions backed by real account data.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by owning the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and running a proactive stakeholder cadence to flag risks early.

Maintained a consolidated backlog of 40+ high-priority tickets across IT, Operations, and Engineering, facilitating Agile ceremonies and translating team feedback into **prioritized sprint deliverables** that stabilized developer intake.

Partnered with cross-functional teams to scope and implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing the manual effort required to support ongoing product improvements.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning the end-to-end proposal lifecycle for 200+ monthly accounts, building a CRM-based process that standardized data capture and surfaced actionable patterns in customer feedback.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy — optimizing digital touchpoints and delivering polished customer-facing reporting to leadership.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and translating findings into a clear, insight-driven narrative for senior stakeholders.
